code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n
      let bopt = string.byte_at(line, i)
      match bopt
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
      when None
        i = n + 1
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - (n + 1)
    else
      i = n
    end
    if i >= n
      i = n
    else
      # read token
      mut start = i
      while i < n
        let bopt2 = string.byte_at(line, i)
        match bopt2
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            i = n + 2
          else
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          i = n + 2
        end
      end
      mut stop = i
      if stop > n
        stop = stop - (n + 2)
      end
      let token = string.substring(line, start, stop)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        product = product * v
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
